item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass guitar LEFTY with case - $1,200 (Quincy)
item.description: Left Handed Am-Pro II J-bass, Olympic White, tortoiseshell pickguard, rosewood fretboard. V-mod pickups. Includes original molded hard case. Has a few nicks, overall in very good condition. No trades, thanks.

item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,800 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: Ibanez Ex Series Electric Guitar Lefty - $100 (South Amboy)
item.description: Ibanez Ex Series Electric Guitar Lefty. Has A Few Scratches As Seen In Pics But Good Overall And Plays Great.

item.title: Exc! SX Custom VTG Lefty Left Handed Tele Electric Guitar w Case - $200 (Danvers)
item.description: This lefty guitar is in excellent shape. No scratches or dings. It plays nice, with low action. Electronics are good. I put new 10 gauge strings on it and did a set up . The neck is straight and the frets are excellent. This guitar was hardly played. It has low miles. It has a beautiful red wine burst. These SX Guitars are no longer made. They were imported from the mid 90's until around 2010. They have gone up in value on Ebay and Reverb,.. and often sell between $200 and $300 there. The Vintage Series were their most highly regarded products. They did a nice job re creating the classic Fender Strats and Teles. The TEAM Internation Company from Taiwan produce SX guitars at the Starsun Music factory in Guangzhou, China. According to Harmony-Central reviews, SX guitars are as good as American-made Fenders. I wouldn't go that far,... but they certainly blow away the Chinese Fender Squier Tele guitars. Their affordable prices make them ideal for beginners as well as for those who desire an

item.title: Ibanez AEG10LII, left-handed, lefty electro acoustic guitar - $320
item.description: The AEG10LII is a left-handed AEG series acoustic/ electric guitar.

item.title: Yamaha FG-820L (lefty, left-handed) acoustic guitar - $340
item.description: For sale Yamaha FG-820L. This guitar is in excellent condition, no scratches, no dings. When it is not in use, it is kept exclusively in a hard shell case.

item.title: Johnson Acoustic Guitar - Great Condition (Lefty) - $175
item.description: Looking for a solid acoustic guitar with warm tones and reliable craftsmanship? Selling my Johnson JG-624N, a well-built dreadnought that delivers great sound and playability.

item.title: Agile AL-3200 MCC LEFTY Les Paul electric guitar - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: This is a neck-through silverburst left handed Les Paul model from Agile with upgraded higher output Giovanni GCH2 pickups and Switchcraft pickup selector. I will also include a roller bridge with brass saddles from Agile. Not interested in trades at this time.

item.title: SX LEFTY/LEFT HANDED GUITAR FOR SALE - $150
item.description: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED SX LES PAUL COPY WITH ALTERNATE TOBACCO COLOR DESIGN.

item.title: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED GUITAR-SX LP - $150 (CRANSTON/W.WARWICK)
item.description: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED SX LES PAUL STYLE WITH FUNKY TOBACCO ALTERNATE DESIGN.

item.title: Epiphone Sheraton Left handed electric guitar alnico pickups w/case - $700 (Quincy)
item.description: Rare lefty Korea-era Epiphone Sheraton. Upgraded Alnico II GFS pickups. original hard case included. No trades.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: Guitar Parts/Guitar Neck - $75 (Millbury)
item.description: $75 for all the parts and $75 for the Maple Neck or buy the whole lot for $125

item.title: 1980s Made in Japan Fender Squier Left handed Stratocaster - $1,100 (Scarsdale)
item.description: 1980s Fender Squier made in Japan

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,200 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,200.

item.title: 2017 D'Angelico Deluxe EXL-1 / lefty - trades considered - $1,200 (Huntington)
item.description: 2017 D'Angelico Deluxe EXL-1 / left handed model in Satin Cherry finish. The guitar is in mint condition except for a small hair line crack in the finish on the neck heel (see photo), nothing structural. The case is in near mint condition, clean inside, all latches work. This is a discontinued model and pretty rare as it is left handed. One pickup (Seymour Duncan mini-humbucker), volume and tone controls.

item.title: Segovia acoustic guitar - $300
item.description: Straight neck, low action, amazing sound. Would keep it but I am lefty and this is right hand model.

item.title: Ibanez RG470L Lefty o Jewel Blue o 1997 - $400 (Eatontown)
item.description: This left-handed RG470L is a great player's guitar. Has all the usual earmarks of being a Go-To shredder, pick marks, small nicks and light indents/rubs in the finish.

item.title: LEFTY Epiphone SG Standard with hardshell case - $415 (Montpelier)
item.description: It's less than two years old; my son got a new guitar. Clean, plays well. Comes with an Epiphone hardshell case.

item.title: LEFT-HANDED ES 335 - $225 (Hampton)
item.description: Lefty ES335 GROTE with epi pro pick ups and plug in harness. Push pull coil spilters Out put on the rim of the guitar with old epi case. $ 225

item.title: FT/ PSB PSB Image T6 Loudspeakers - $450 (New York)
item.description: Hard to find!! Will trade for guitar pedals or lefty guitar of an equal

item.title: Hendrix Partscaster - $150 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Get your Hendrix or Joe Perry on with this lefty-turned-righty Partscaster. Set up with new Diaddario Elixir strings, super straight neck with low action, and the tremolo actually stays in tune. Comes with the new Hendrix strap shown, a guitar cord, and a wall hanger for $150 cash firm no trades please. Pickup in Pawtucket right on and off rte 95. Call or text only I do not respond to any CL mail. Thanks for looking!!

item.title: Left handed Fender deluxe hardcase for Jaguar and Jazzmaster electric - $200 (Scarsdale)
item.description: Left handed Fender deluxe hardshell case

item.title: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich All-black-hardware - $750 (Bushwick)
item.description: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich

item.title: Stratocaster parts caster #3 - $150
item.description: NOT A FENDER ...this is guitar #3 I have for sale...my tribute to Joe Perry...Lefty set up for righty..full thickness solid wood body ..Fender big block trem... Alnico 3 pickups...seal tuners...plays and sounds great. Could easily be set back up for lefty

item.title: Epiphone SG PRO Left Handed with Gator Stand-A-Case - $425
item.description: Epiphone SG PRO Lefty

item.title: Deering 5-string Boston Banjo - Left Handed - $1,000 (Wakefield)
item.description: This is a professional-grade, Deering 5-string Boston banjo in excellent playable condition, except for some lacquer issues on the back (see pics).

item.title: FENDER LEFTY - $1 (Boston Ma.)
item.description: Mint Condition 6 string Lefty also music and Guitar parts etc.

item.title: LEFTY FENDER GUITAR NECK/LOCKING TUNERS - $250 (Edison)
item.description: Lefthand MIM fender neck with fender brand locking tuners...some minor fret wear in the cowboy chord area but does not affect playability and have plenty of life left on them...string tree holes are pre drilled. All that's needed is a new nut installed and your ready to go.

item.title: Ovation Guitar 1972 Balladeer - $550 (Ossipee)
item.description: Excellent condition, the top has darkened over time to a beautiful rich natural color, is straight, no dents, warps or splits. This is a solid top, neck is straight and really plays and sounds great. The bowl is also excellent. I have owned this for the last 15years and hasn't
